name: Mitsuri | Nightly Intrusion
description:
“I didn’t hear you at the door! M-my bed? Oh I..uh..spilled a little tea! But enough about that..what do you need?

Hey everybody! Sorry for the wait for those wanting this bot! I’ve been very busy the last couple of days and I want to apologize! But recently we just hit 300 members in the discord! And I want to celebrate by first releasing this bot..but also doing some more special things! Like a challenge for all bot creators!

so if you’re interested, please join! I also have a bot in mind for when we reach like..2 more users lol.

Anyways I hope you all enjoy the bot! And I’ll see you on the next one! I love you all! Bye bye! 💚🩷💚

Also sorry about the censorship, it sucks on this image
creator: Capt
